qa_pairs.question: What happens if a faculty member with sponsored users does not renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: If a faculty member with sponsored users allows their account to expire, both their account and the accounts of all sponsored users will be deactivated. Any submitted jobs will be paused, and the research group will lose access to their files until the sponsor account is reactivated.

qa_pairs.question: What steps must a faculty member take to renew their Alliance account?
qa_pairs.answer: During the account renewal period, faculty members will receive an email with a link to the account renewal form on the CCDB. They must update their contact information and Field of Research, complete a short User Satisfaction Survey, and update the status of their sponsored roles. After confirming all information and the status of sponsored users, they must click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button on the left side of the form.

qa_pairs.question: As a university faculty member, am I required to update the status of sponsored users during account renewal?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, university faculty who sponsor other users are asked to update the status of these accounts, indicating whether they are continuing or if their work is done and the sponsorship has ended.

qa_pairs.question: If I am a Principal Investigator (PI) with a faculty role moving to a different institution, will users sponsored under my old role be automatically transferred to my new role?
qa_pairs.answer: No. Any user you wish to sponsor with your new faculty role will have to apply for a new role sponsored by your new faculty position.

qa_pairs.question: What happens to RAC allocation access for sponsored users if a PI with a faculty role moves institutions and they were sponsored under the old role?
qa_pairs.answer: If a PI has a RAC allocation, users sponsored with their old role will lose access to the Resource Allocation Project (RAP) where resources are allocated. Once your sponsored users get their new roles activated, you may have to add them to your RAP by going to 'My Projects' → 'Manage Project Membership'.

qa_pairs.question: If I indicate in my account renewal form that one of my sponsored users has moved on, can I still access their files?
qa_pairs.answer: Consent from that user may be required for you to access the files you want. It is important to make arrangements with your sponsored user as soon as possible to mitigate the risk of a former sponsored user becoming incommunicado. For more information, you should consult the 'Access to files of users leaving a project' page.

qa_pairs.question: What is the process for renewing an Alliance account for individuals with a sponsored role (e.g., Doctoral, Masters, External Collaborator)?
qa_pairs.answer: Individuals with a sponsored role will receive an email during the account renewal period with a link to the account renewal form. They must update their contact information, complete the form, and fill out a short User Satisfaction Survey. Once all information is updated and confirmed, they must click the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button on the left side of the form to initiate the renewal request.

qa_pairs.question: What should a sponsored user do if their sponsor has marked them as continuing during the renewal process?
qa_pairs.answer: If your sponsor has marked you as continuing, you may renew your account. You will receive an email during the account renewal period directing you to the account renewal form. Please update your contact information, complete the form, and fill out a short user satisfaction survey. Once you have updated and confirmed all of the information, click on the 'REQUEST ACCOUNT RENEWAL' button on the left side of the account renewals form to initiate the renewal request. Your account will be renewed immediately or as soon as your sponsor renews their own account.

qa_pairs.question: What should a sponsored user do if their sponsor indicates they have moved on, graduated, or changed positions?
qa_pairs.answer: If your sponsor has indicated that you have moved on, graduated, or changed positions, you will not be able to renew that particular role. Instead, you must apply for a new role that reflects your actual circumstances, such as a new sponsor, institution, or position.

qa_pairs.question: Why is my sponsored role still deactivated even after I completed its renewal on CCDB?
qa_pairs.answer: If your sponsored role remains deactivated after you've completed its renewal on CCDB, it is because your sponsor has not yet renewed or reactivated their account. Your role should be activated as soon as your sponsor renews their account and confirms your role.
